name: HypeRate Desktop
description: HypeRate Desktop is a free, open-source desktop application that displays live heart rate data as a floating always-on-top overlay for macOS, Windows, and Linux. It connects to the HypeRate WebSocket API and is designed for streamers, gamers, and athletes.

skills.name: Get Download Links
skills.description: Returns download links for HypeRate Desktop for macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows, and Linux (AppImage & .deb)
examples: How do I download HypeRate Desktop?
Where can I get the macOS version?

skills.name: App Feature Information
skills.description: Returns details about HypeRate Desktop features: overlay customization, heart rate zones, hotkeys, platform support
examples: What features does HypeRate Desktop have?

skills.name: Frequently Asked Questions
skills.description: Answers common questions about HypeRate Desktop setup, compatibility, and usage
